title: Smoke Monsoon Shrimp Tacos
description: A floral and silky monsoon-inspired Mexican dish featuring smoked shrimp in a vegetable-based sauce for vegetarians.
instructions: Soak corn tortillas in vegetable stock for about 5 minutes. Pat dry and sprinkle with paprika, oregano, chili powder, salt, and pepper.

Heat a skillet over medium-high heat; lightly grease it with olive oil. Place the soaked tortillas in the skillet and toast until golden brown on each side, about 1-2 minutes per side. Remove from pan to plate.
In a mixing bowl, combine lime juice with smoked shrimp, garlic powder, salt, and pepper. Toss gently to coat evenly.

Heat oil in a pot over medium-high heat. Add the vegetable stock or broth into the pot and bring to a simmer. Reduce heat to low and add lime-juiced shrimp mixture to the pot. Simmer for about 5 minutes until shrimp are cooked through, adding more liquid as needed to keep the sauce smooth.
Serve hot in tortillas with vegetable chips, diced avocado, and cilantro.
